message:
feat(algorithms,python): rewrite BFS-based algorithms with directed graph support, fix triadic census labels

- Rewrite average_shortest_path_length with inline BFS, return infinity for
  disconnected graphs; add average_shortest_path_length_directed for DiGraph
- Rewrite wiener_index with inline BFS, change return type from Option<f64>
  to f64 (infinity for disconnected); add wiener_index_directed for DiGraph
- Add all_simple_paths_directed for DiGraph; handle source==target edge case
  in undirected all_simple_paths; dispatch directed vs undirected in Python binding
- Fix greedy_color DSATUR tie-breaking order (degree and node comparisons)
- Fix triadic census 111D/111U and 120D/120U label swaps
- Add edge_keys() iterator to MultiGraph and MultiDiGraph
- Add edge_attrs_for_directed() lookup in Python GraphRef; fix multigraph
  edge attribute lookups to use actual edge keys instead of hardcoded 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
